package rulecoverage

func NegativeErrorsNewForStaticSentinel() string {
    ruleID := "errors_new_for_static_sentinel"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`errors.New(\"some error\")` called repeatedly in hot paths instead of a package-level sentinel"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
